title: AutoTillDirt
description: A simple client-side mod that can automatically till dirt for you.
body:
**A simple client-side mod that will automatically till dirt and grass blocks for you when it is enabled and you are holding a hoe. Below is a list of commands you can use to customize what it does.**

---

### Commands

### `/autoTill enable`
Enables AutoTill. AutoTill will automatically till blocks when you are holding a hoe and it is enabled.

### `/autoTill disable`
Disables AutoTill. AutoTill will not till blocks while disabled.

### `/autoTill radius <float>`
Sets how far around the player AutoTill should scan for dirt and grass blocks.

### `/autoTill onlyBelowFeet <true|false>`
If true, only tills blocks in a circular radius below the players feet. If false, will till every block in a spherical radius around the player.

### `/autoTill allowBreakTools <true|false>`
If false, AutoTill will not break hoes, and stop tilling when the hoe reaches 1 durability. 

### `/autoTill maxBlocksPerTick <int>`
Sets the maximum number of blocks AutoTill will attempt to till in a single tick.

### `/autoTill sort <closest|furthest|random>`
Changes which blocks to prioritize.

### `/autoTill help <closest|furthest|random>`
Sends this list of commands in chat.
